{{Infobox character
| name = Wei Grand Elder
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Sage
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Wei [[Grand Elder]] is the leader of the [[Wei clan]] and has been governing the Valley during the absence of [[Li Markuth]]. He is a figure of significant reputation, as other clan elders frequently discuss him. Physically, he possesses distinctive white circles in his eyes and carries a right arm that is heavily bound in specialized bandages. These bandages are not for medical purposes but serve to suppress and hide his immense power, which some believe may be linked to a [[Divine Treasure]]. Although he appeared to lack detectable [[madra]] initially, his energy is actually present but heavily muffled. During a confrontation with [[Li Markuth]], the [[Grand Elder]] appeared visibly shaken but ultimately commanded that the [[arena]] be emptied.}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Wei Shi [[Lindon]] is a [[Sage]] characterized by black eyes with glowing white irises. His right arm is perpetually bound in scripted bandages that serve to [[veil]] and restrain his power. During the events at the [[arena]], he issued a call for the immediate evacuation of the area.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Wei Grand Elder]] is a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35">''Waybound'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Wei Grand Elder]]'s right arm is wrapped in scripted bandages that restrain and [[veil]] power.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Wei Grand Elder]] has black eyes with white irises that seem to glow.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Wei Grand Elder]]'s name is Wei Shi [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Wei Grand Elder]] called for the evacuation of the [[arena]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“Evacuate the arena,” the Wei Grand Elder called.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
